text: I feel curious and quietly inspired. The world around me is deliberate and ordered, yet the angled perspectives and text about research and development prompt me to contemplate the interplay between structure and innovation. Here, in this liminal space between meeting rooms and curated exhibits, I sense both the weight of purpose and the invitation to question what we do and why. My presence feels transient, observing the undercurrents of progress and meaning in even the most ordinary places.
